response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Analysis: The primary speaker is the VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis playing Minecraft, along with other Hololive members like Fuwawa, Mococo, and Korone speaking in the background. 2. Reference JSON: The reference JSON identified Shiori Novella instead of Ina'nis, so manual transcription and character identification were performed to match the actual audio. 3. Timing: Captured both Ina'nis's commentary, Japanese dialogue from other players, and critical on-screen text system alerts.

subtitles.original: If we can have one of the breeders be the super rare breeding one...
subtitles.english: If we can have one of the breeders be the super rare breeding one...

subtitles.original: Oh, I got two gold hearts.
subtitles.english: Oh, I got two gold hearts.

subtitles.original: I still got to dust some of the sand blocks.
subtitles.english: I still got to dust some of the sand blocks.

subtitles.original: So we must breed the bees first. Wait, actually...
subtitles.english: So we must breed the bees first. Wait, actually...

subtitles.original: ...I guess it's a common bee. Oh, wait, I forgot to sell the bee. Oh, it's alright, it's okay, it's okay.
subtitles.english: ...I guess it's a common bee. Oh, wait, I forgot to sell the bee. Oh, it's alright, it's okay, it's okay.

subtitles.original: Can I place it on top? Oh, I can't.
subtitles.english: Can I place it on top? Oh, I can't.

subtitles.original: Let me try it on a normal sand block here, though.
subtitles.english: Let me try it on a normal sand block here, though.

subtitles.original: [考古学者(ブラシ)が開放。アルケミストLv.3以上が必要]
subtitles.english: [Archaeology (brush) unlocks at Alchemist Lv 3 or higher]

subtitles.original: I mean, I can re-spec once.
subtitles.english: I mean, I can re-spec once.

subtitles.original: I didn't use my level-up ones today, so I could put it into Alchemist.
subtitles.english: I didn't use my level-up ones today, so I could put it into Alchemist.

subtitles.original: Yeah, reset is once a day.
subtitles.english: Yeah, reset is once a day.

subtitles.original: Special mission: Monster Hunter. Okay, okay.
subtitles.english: Special mission: Monster Hunter. Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Hold on, let me look at the manual here.
subtitles.english: Hold on, let me look at the manual here.

subtitles.original: I think the max points do increase...
subtitles.english: I think the max points do increase...

subtitles.original: I think you can still do the daily quests the day after, so maybe I'll wait.
subtitles.english: I think you can still do the daily quests the day after, so maybe I'll wait.

subtitles.original: ころね先輩が元の、いつものボリュームになってる。
subtitles.english: Korone-senpai's volume is back to normal.

subtitles.original: まだある！パンがいっぱいだ！
subtitles.english: There's still more! I have so much bread!
